{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Dawnwing
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dawnwing]] is the name of [[Ziel]]'s sect.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"Dawnwing!" The man recognized the symbol of Ziel’s sect.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
